violations.text: An employee was observed washing their hands at the 3-bay sink. Food employees shall clean their hands in a designated hand-washing sink and not in a food preparation, mop, or ware-washing sink. PIC informed employee that they must wash hands in hand sink exclusively. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2025

Raw lobster tails were observed thawed in their original intact reduced oxygen packaging (ROP). Seafood packaged in ROP packaging shall be removed from its original packaging prior to thawing to allow the reintroduction of oxygen into the food item. Lobster tails were observed at temperature ranging from 35-37 degrees Fahrenheit and were removed from their original packaging during the time of inspection. Proper thawing procedures reviewed with PIC during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2025

Utensils were observed stored in sanitizer between uses without allowing utensils to air dry. Utensils between uses shall be stored in one of the following manners: on a dry clean surface, in water of 135 degrees Fahrenheit or more, or in water with sufficient flow to flush particulates to the drain. utensils were removed from sanitizer during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2025

A knife was observed stored between prep units on the cookline. Utensils between uses shall be stored in one of the following manners: on a dry clean surface, in water of 135 degrees Fahrenheit or more, or in water with sufficient flow to flush particulates to the drain. Utensil was removed from between prep units and was cleaned and sanitized during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2025

The cutting boards on the cookline prep units are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 05/10/2025
